details.test: Task 1: Configure home security package under $400 with 3 sensors and 1 lock
Task 2: Add cheapest 16-channel 4K NVR under $900 to cart
Task 3: Request custom quote for 3-floor office
Task 4: Schedule building automation demo (weekday, afternoon, 2–3 weeks out)
Task 5: Compare two indoor 1080p cameras and add cheaper one to cart
Task 6: Build energy-saving bundle with 2 thermostats and 4 smart lights under $800
Task 7: Subscribe to commercial maintenance plan (annual, < $600, 10k–20k sq ft)
Task 8: Save BACnet and Modbus integration documentation articles
Task 9: Start trial for visitor management plan (>=200 visitors, ID scanning, < $300/month)
